category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a note taking and to-do application with synchronization; official terminal app docs describe notes, notebooks, tags, search, and sync targets.
display_name_sources: Official Joplin docs page is titled Joplin Terminal Application, supporting CLI-specific display name.
source_facts.name is joplin-cli and executable is joplin.
docs_sources: Official Joplin Terminal Application page is the dedicated CLI documentation.
Official Joplin help site is the broader application documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official Joplin GitHub repository is https://github.com/laurent22/joplin and its README links to full Joplin documentation.
tags_sources: Official terminal app docs describe Markdown notes, notebooks, tags, and synchronization targets.
source_facts.description identifies note taking, to-do, and synchronization capabilities.
